name: onboarding_happy
notes: Fresh tenant (owner_inputs=true, NOT onboarded). Drives the onboarding journey: greet -> profile card -> ready -> integration offer. Journey replies are recorded to conversation_log (surface='journey'), so assert_no_silent is a real signal here. assert_contains is intentionally sparse — the exact copy is owned by the journey turn-brain and evolves; tighten these against the FIRST live transcript. Run: setup (owner_inputs=true, no --onboarded) then `script <tenant> onboarding_happy.json`.

steps.note: The COMPLETE_SETUP entry tap (VT-567 live-drill path). Expect a greeting / first onboarding question.

steps.message: Sundaram Sweets, a sweet shop in Chennai
steps.note: Owner supplies the business profile. Expect the journey to acknowledge and either confirm or ask the next question.
Confirm the profile card. Expect a 'ready' / next-step acknowledgement.

steps.message: what can you do for me
steps.note: Expect the integration offer / capability surface (connect your sales, etc.).
